subject: chemistry
title: 16N.1.SL.TZ0.30
question_html:
A student measured the change in mass on heating a sample of calcium carbonate, CaCO3(s). What is the mass loss?

Mass before heating: 2.347 g ± 0.001
Mass after heating: 2.001 g ± 0.001 

A. 0.346g ± 0.001 

B. 0.346g ± 0.002 

C. 0.35g ± 0.002 

D. 0.35g ± 0.001
